title: Melanie Mitchell Takes AI Research Back to Its Roots
summary: To build a general artificial intelligence, we may need to know more about our own minds, argues the computer scientist Melanie Mitchell. The post Melanie Mitchell Takes AI Research Back to Its Roots first appeared on Quanta Magazine
content:
To build a general artificial intelligence, we may need to know more about our own minds, argues the computer scientist Melanie Mitchell.
